ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city to which the neighborhood belongs */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the neighborhood */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of residents in the neighborhood */,
  "median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of residents in the neighborhood */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population over 25 years old */,
  "less_than_high_school" INTEGER /* Number of individuals with less than high school education */,
  "high_school_graduate" INTEGER /* Number of high school graduates */,
  "ged_or_alternative" INTEGER /* Number of individuals with a GED or alternative credential */,
  "some_college" INTEGER /* Number of individuals with some college education */,
  "associates_degree" INTEGER /* Number of individuals with an associate's degree */,
  "bachelors_degree" INTEGER /* Number of individuals with a bachelor's degree */,
  "masters_degree_or_more" INTEGER /* Number of individuals with a master's degree or more */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year to which the population statistics apply */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Number of males in the population */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Number of females in the population */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the population */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the education level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education statistic record */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population record */,
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of individuals with the specified education level */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year to which the statistics apply */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_statistics_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES population ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_statistics_education_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_level_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., demographic, educational) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_data" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the forecast is made */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population forecast */,
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level */,
  "forecasted_count" INTEGER /* Forecasted count of individuals with the specified education level */,
  "male_population_forecast" INTEGER /* Forecasted number of males */,
  "female_population_forecast" INTEGER /* Forecasted number of females */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forecast was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forecast was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_education_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_level_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy or program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy or program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the policy or program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the policy or program */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the policy or program */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the policy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the policy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact record */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the impact record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the impact record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_impact_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_impact_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration record */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy */,
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stakeholder */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the stakeholder in the collaboration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_stakeholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("stakeholder_id") REFERENCES stakeholders ("stakeholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stakeholders" (
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stakeholder */,
  "stakeholder_name" TEXT /* Name of the stakeholder */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the stakeholder */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the stakeholder */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the stakeholder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stakeholder record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stakeholder record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stakeholder_id")
)
